heading: Omitted
label: 1054 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for payment of costs incurred in preparation of rolls and distribution of payment of pro rata shares, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 88–506, § 478 Stat. 639Aug. 30, 1964
